workspace.description: Return only results found in the given workspace ID.

active.description: If true, return only active monitors.

owner.description: Return only results that belong to the given user ID.

collectionUid.description: Filter the results by a collection's unique ID.

environmentUid.description: Filter the results by an environment's unique ID.

cursor.description: The pointer to the first record of the set of paginated results. To view the next response, use the `nextCursor` value for this parameter.

limit.description: The maximum number of rows to return in the response, up to a maximum value of 25. Any value greater than 25 returns a 400 Bad Request response.
